content.title: Areas We Serve
content.subtitle: Concrete craftsmanship across Central Ohio
content.description: From Columbus to surrounding communities, Maxima Concrete delivers premium driveways, patios, and outdoor living spaces backed by our in-house team.

content.title: Style Options for your Paver Driveway

styles.title: Broom-Finished:
styles.description: Broom-finished concrete is one of the most popular and versatile concrete finishes for patios, driveways, sidewalks, porches, and steps. Created by brushing the surface before it fully cures, this finish adds subtle texture and improved slip resistance while maintaining a clean, classic appearance. Durable, low-maintenance, and cost-effective, broom-finished concrete is ideal for both residential and commercial properties, offering long-lasting performance and timeless curb appeal.

styles.title: Stamped & Colored:
styles.description: Stamped and colored concrete enhances the look of patios, walkways, driveways, and outdoor living spaces. By imprinting patterns and adding color during the installation process, concrete can replicate the appearance of natural stone, brick, slate, or wood at a more cost-effective price. With a wide variety of textures, patterns, and color options available, this finish offers endless design possibilities. The result is a durable, low-maintenance surface that combines beauty and functionality.

styles.title: Exposed Aggregate:
styles.description: Exposed Aggregate concrete creates a bold, textured appearance by revealing the decorative stones embedded within the concrete surface. This finish highlights the natural color and character of the aggregate, creating added visual interest and depth. Popular for driveways, patios, pool decks, and walkways, Exposed Aggregate offers a durable, slip-resistant surface with a natural look.

styles.title: Buff Wash:
styles.description: Buff Wash concrete creates a unique, textured appearance by gently exposing the natural sand and fine aggregates within the concrete surface. Through a specialized finishing process, the top layer of concrete is carefully removed to reveal subtle textures and natural color variations. Available in different exposure levels, Buff Wash is a popular choice for patios, pool decks, walkways, and outdoor living areas, offering a refined, natural look with added texture and visual depth.

content.description: Choose a finish that balances strength, safety, and curb appeal. Each option is engineered for daily use and long-term durability.

We combine expert craftsmanship, high-grade materials, and full regulatory support to deliver results that last for decades. Whether you need a new driveway approach, a replacement apron, or a sidewalk connection, we make sure every project is done right — the first time.

content.title:
Paver Patios That Bring 
Your Backyard to Life
content.description:
A paver patio isn’t just a surface — it’s the heart of your outdoor living space. At Maxima Concrete, we combine artistry and engineering to design patios that blend natural beauty with long-lasting strength.

Our team uses premium paver materials in earthy tones, warm reds, or modern grays — creating elegant layouts that reflect your home’s character while withstanding Central Ohio’s seasons. Whether you want a cozy circular firepit area or a large entertaining zone, we’ll bring your vision to life with precision and care.

content.description1: At Maxima, our craftsmen blend precision, design, and durability to create spaces that last — from concrete driveways to luxury pools and patios.

A high-quality porch immediately elevates your home’s exterior, adding sophistication and boosting resale value.

content.description: When you choose Maxima Concrete, you're not just getting a surface — you're getting decades of experience, technical precision, and craftsmanship.

content.title: What Is Stamped & Colored Concrete?
content.description:
This decorative process uses specialized rubber stamps to imprint textures and designs into freshly poured concrete. 

While the surface is still workable, color pigments are integrated into or applied onto the concrete, creating realistic depth and dimension that rivals natural materials — at a fraction of the cost.

Once cured, the surface is cleaned, detailed, and sealed, locking in color vibrancy and protecting it from moisture, UV rays, and wear.

The result: a visually striking, low-maintenance surface that stands up to Ohio’s weather and daily use.

items.text: The textured surface helps prevent slipping, making it perfect for driveways, pool decks, patios, and walkways.

items.label: Long-Lasting Durability:

items.label: Low Maintenance:
